message:
feat: implement safety invariant layer and bundler improvements

Safety Invariant Layer (meta_skill-qox):
- Add tombstone-based deletion system for ms-managed directories
- Implement TombstoneManager with tombstone/restore/purge operations
- Add ms safety command with status/log/check subcommands
- Expand ms prune command with list/purge/restore/stats operations
- SafetyGate integration for DCG safety checks

Bundler Improvements (meta_skill-08m):
- Add ms bundle list command to show installed bundles
- Implement InstallOptions with signature verification support
- Add install_with_options function for verified bundle installation
- Export Ed25519Verifier and SignatureVerifier from bundler module

Uncertainty Queue Fixes (meta_skill-4g1):
- Fix field access in queue_uncertain implementation
- Correct create_pattern_from_cluster to use actual struct fields
- All compilation errors resolved, 262 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
